name: zimmer-catalog
description: Zimmer's self-contained AIR catalog. Every artifact index lives in this repo and resolves fully offline (no private GitHub catalogs, no network), so the app's config services always resolve non-empty data. `skills/` carries both the Zimmer-specific skills (`category: zimmer`) and the vendored generic workflow skills (`category: workflow` — `pr`, `wait-for-ci`, `recover-from-compaction-thrashing`); a standalone install inherits nothing from an outside orchestrator, so anything a session needs is default-on for the `zimmer` root via `default_in_roots`.
